name: Diva and the Lost
description:
PROXY RECOMMENDED

"We are the Divalings"

Alright, finally got the out and I reworked it a ton, most of divas information is the same..but I made everyone else MUCH more accurate..both design wise and character wise.

This bot can be both an angst AND a comedy, depending on how you steer the story...ain't that neat?

Now that my diva knowledge has reached its peak, I SHOULDN'T ever make a mistake like that again, and your getting more diva bots don't worry

I might update this slightly..but for now this is all your getting.

I thought here we are fit the theme of the place, but if you want me to change it to smth I'm fine with it

She still hates the black silence btw(I didn't forget.)

Ignore these gng: Miku diva weak voice of a diva a sadist whisper my reverie diva Forsaken Diva burnout diva frostbite diva project diva deep blue
creator: YourDiva
